def norm(s):
    # normalize removing diacritics, tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza, lower, collapse spaces
    # Remove diacritics
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ','')  # tatweel
    # unify hamza forms: alef with hamza above/below to alef
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def search_quran(sub):
    nsub=norm(sub)
    hits=[]
    for rec in quran:
        text=rec['ayah_text']
        if nsub in norm(text):
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

def search_quran_contains(fragment):
    # search containing any token from fragment strongly
    nfrag=norm(fragment)
    tokens=nfrag.split()
    hits=[]
    for rec in quran:
        ntext=norm(rec['ayah_text'])
        # if all tokens appear?
        if all(tok in ntext for tok in tokens if tok):
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

def search_quran_regex(pattern):
    pattern=re.compile(pattern)
    hits=[]
    for rec in quran:
        if pattern.search(rec['ayah_text']):
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

frag="وَلَقَدْ مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ"

def top_similar_hadith(s, topn=10):
    sims=[]
    for rec in hadiths:
        # choose Matn if exists otherwise hadithTxt
        text=rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""
        ratio=similarity_ratio(s, text)
        tf1=token_f1(s, text)
        sims.append((ratio, tf1, rec, text))
    sims.sort(key=lambda x:x[0], reverse=True)
    return sims[:topn]
